breaths-wrong.title: The “new” voice breathes like a machine

insulin-dose.title: Insulin for a meal she never ate

rights-rider.title: Her voice reverts if she died first

staged-quiet.title: The scene was staged quiet
staged-quiet.text: No struggle — and the time of death won't fit the room. She was placed here. Found, not died.

when-not-who.title: Ask when, not who
when-not-who.text: If the “new” recordings are fabricated and the death is older than the scene admits, the real question isn't who killed Della Voss. It's when she actually died.
